message: Digest delivered: 14 new handoff entries added in the last run.

summary: Documented a repo-wide workspace identity alignment checklist, refreshed the legacy registry mirror, and left the card in review until pytest can be installed to rerun the registry helper test.

blockers: pip install --user pytest still fails (nodename nor servname provided), so backend/tests/test_workspace_registry_legacy.py cannot run in this environment yet.

mindset_signals: Execution results should feed the same memory loop that standups and OpenClaw already trust.
outcomes: Ran python3 scripts/workspace_registry_legacy.py to sync memory/workspace_registry.json with the canonical backend registry after generating the new alignment report.
